I'm applying for the Junior DevOps Platform Engineer role at Luxoft. I see you're looking for someone to bridge the gap between development and infrastructure using Python and automation, which fits my background in software engineering and CI/CD workflows.

I currently develop core features in C++ and JavaScript at EXAIL Robotics. I also redesigned our installation process. It used to take about 2 days. Now it takes 2 hours and anyone on the team can run it. That's an 85% reduction in deployment time. I'm used to troubleshooting complex systems and making them accessible to others.

On my own time, I built ValoFenua, a real estate platform with a full-stack React and Supabase architecture. It uses a daily scraper for 1,300+ listings and an AI agent to process market data. I also manage my own VPS infrastructure with n8n and Docker to automate job search pipelines and MCP servers. My experience with SQL and UNIX environments is hands-on and project-driven.

I'm finishing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering in 2026. I'm excited by the challenge of supporting high-stakes capital market applications in your Singapore center.

Aodren Gloux
aodren.gloux@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/aodren-gloux | github.com/GAodren

stack: CI/CD, GenAI tools, GitLab, Azure DevOps, Cloud Security, GitHub Copilot, Automation
commentaire: This role is a great match because it specifically asks for GenAI integration into developer workflows, which aligns perfectly with your AI automation projects.
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I'm applying for the DevSecOps Engineer role within the AIDA unit at Singtel. I saw you are looking to integrate GenAI tools like GitHub Copilot into development workflows, which is exactly what I focus on through my automation projects.

I built an automated job search pipeline with n8n, AI agents, and a Model Context Protocol server. I also developed ValoFenua, a platform that uses a daily scraper for 1,300 listings and an AI agent to estimate real estate prices. These systems show my ability to move beyond basic coding and build environments where AI handles complex tasks automatically.

I also redesigned the installation process at my current company, EXAIL Robotics. It used to take about 2 days. Now it takes 2 hours and anyone on the team can run it. That's an 85% reduction in deployment time. I’m comfortable working across C++, JavaScript, and Python to bridge the gap between development and operations.

I'm finishing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering (2026). I'm impressed by Singtel's commitment to embedding intelligence into every layer of the business and would love to help secure and automate those AI pipelines.

Aodren Gloux
aodren.gloux@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/aodren-gloux | github.com/GAodren
